name: Feta Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Romaine lettuce - torn into bite size pieces
1/2 lb Feta cheese - sliced or cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill all vegetables, olives, and cheese.
2. Combine dressing ingredients.
3. When ready to serve, toss all vegetables and olives with the dressing.
4. Top with Feta cheese and serve.
